meta.homeDescription: Commonwealth Preschool of Abidjan — preschool in Abidjan.

partnership.title: A shared vision
partnership.body: Commonwealth Preschool of Abidjan combines excellence with the Finnish approach to early childhood education to build an innovative, forward-looking pedagogy.

about.title: About
about.p1: Commonwealth Preschool of Abidjan is a bilingual preschool (English–French) welcoming children from 6 months to 6 years in an environment designed to reveal who they are—through play. Children are free to follow their curiosity, explore without judgment, and discover at their own pace.
about.p2: Our pedagogy is rooted in the Finnish curriculum, recognized as one of the world's finest education systems. We believe every child has potential—just expressed differently. Our role is to find out how—and to build their path from there.

values.title: Our values
values.revealBody: Every child arrives with their strengths. Not always visible. Not always named. Our work is to reveal them with kindness— and build their path from there.
values.resilienceBody: Get back up, try again, and understand that mistakes are part of the journey.
values.curiosityBody: Question, explore, and learn without limits.
values.collabBody: Learn together, respect differences, and build a community.
